reason: Preserve the canonical Git project identity contract and grouping-only aliases.
Read Copilot SQLite schemas defensively across schema drift without mutating external data.
Keep metadata discovery best-effort while avoiding silent incorrect mappings.
Carry stale/ephemeral cleanup metadata across main-to-renderer without renderer filesystem access.
Clean persisted project rows without dropping valid manually-added missing folders or session cwd.
Maintain explicit internal session/repository and mapping types.
Trace historical session cwd, extraFolders, backend aliases, renderer migration, and execution cwd.
Retain Git-first identity semantics and avoid folder-name/remote heuristics for live paths.
